
Writing ec 81 = 00
EC RAM:
00: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00 30 
10: 03 00 04 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
30: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
40: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 
50: 07 01 c7 0c 00 00 01 40 f0 00 00 18 00 15 04 1a 
60: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
70: 22 03 04 01 08 61 00 00 0c 00 00 5a 00 00 00 00 
80: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 
90: 00 00 00 04 ff ff 00 00 00 c1 00 00 00 00 03 0c 
a0: 80 80 80 80 80 80 80 80 25 1f 17 00 25 00 80 17 
b0: 80 80 80 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 13 00 00 00 00 0b 
c0: 42 01 71 00 00 40 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
d0: 32 2b 3a 35 44 3c 50 46 5a 56 61 59 62 63 00 00 
e0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
f0: 4a 34 48 54 33 30 57 57 28 31 2e 31 31 29 20 00
